heading: Sites for conducting research; availability of personnel and facilities
label: 665 Sites for conducting research; availability of personnel and facilities
text: Research authorized by this chapter may be conducted wherever suitable personnel and facilities are available.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was classified to , prior to repeal by .section 3 of Pub. L. 86–599section 663 of this titlePub. L. 109–58, § 1009(a)(1)(C)
